This strategy uses a combination of RSI, Bollinger Bands and ATR to identify potential trading opportunities in the crypto market. The use of these indicators allows for a more precise identification of trend strength and price levels, which when combined with liquidity hour based filter (mode_consensus = 1), helps in reducing false signals.
